prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_1: small purple rubber sphere
  - obj_2: small brown rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: large cyan metal sphere
  - obj_4: large gray metal cube
  - obj_5: small green metal sphere
  - obj_6: large green rubber sphere
  - obj_7: small blue metal sphere
  - obj_8: large brown metal cube
  - obj_9: small cyan rubber cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0121] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0122] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0129] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0130] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0131] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0132] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0133] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0134] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0135] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0136] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0139] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0140] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in the scene. Let me carefully examine the images to estimate positions.

From the images, I can identify approximate 3D positions:
- obj_0 (cyan metal cube): back-left area, elevated
- obj_1 (purple rubber sphere): middle area
- obj_2 (brown rubber cylinder): front-center area
- obj_3 (large cyan metal sphere): center-right area
- obj_4 (large gray metal cube): center-left or front area
- obj_5 (small green metal sphere): right side
- obj_6 (large green rubber sphere): left or front area
- obj_7 (small blue metal sphere): front-center area
- obj_8 (large brown metal cube): center area
- obj_9 (small cyan rubber cylinder): right area

Let me estimate distances more carefully from the multiple views:

obj_0 to obj_5: These are both on the right/back area - moderate distance
obj_3 to obj_8: cyan sphere to brown cube - moderate distance
obj_3 to obj_9: cyan sphere to cyan cylinder - close
obj_4 to obj_6: gray cube to green sphere - close/moderate
obj_4 to obj_7: gray cube to blue sphere - moderate
obj_4 to obj_8: gray cube to brown cube - close
obj_4 to obj_9: gray cube to cyan cylinder - moderate
obj_6 to obj_7: green sphere to blue sphere - moderate
obj_6 to obj_8: green sphere to brown cube - moderate
obj_6 to obj_9: green sphere to cyan cylinder - moderate
obj_7 to obj_8: blue sphere to brown cube - moderate
obj_7 to obj_9: blue sphere to cyan cylinder - moderate
obj_8 to obj_9: brown cube to cyan cylinder - moderate
obj_0 to obj_6: cyan cube to green sphere - large distance
obj_1 to obj_2: purple sphere to brown cylinder - moderate
obj_1 to obj_3: purple sphere to cyan sphere - moderate
obj_1 to obj_4: purple sphere to gray cube - moderate
obj_1 to obj_5: purple sphere to green metal sphere - moderate
obj_1 to obj_8: purple sphere to brown cube - moderate
obj_1 to obj_9: purple sphere to cyan cylinder - moderate
obj_2 to obj_3: brown cylinder to cyan sphere - moderate
obj_2 to obj_4: brown cylinder to gray cube - moderate
